ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Note that you either need to install ZotServer plugin in Zotero 6 or enable Local API support in Zotero 7 advanced settings.
ast.target: 请注意，您需要在Zotero 6中安装ZotServer插件，或在Zotero 7高级设置中启用本地API支持。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This parameter only works with Zotero 7 connection type.
ast.target: 此参数仅适用于Zotero 7连接类型。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Don't change unless you really know what you are doing
ast.target: 除非您非常清楚自己在做什么，否则请勿更改

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Couldn't connect to Zotero, please check the app is open and Zotero Local API is enabled
ast.target: 无法连接到Zotero，请检查应用程序是否已打开且Zotero本地API已启用

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Couldn't connect to Zotero, please check the app is open and ZotServer is installed
ast.target: 无法连接到Zotero，请检查应用程序是否已打开且ZotServer已安装
